name: Cinderswallow Urn
explicitMods: +18 to Maximum Charges
Recharges 5 Charges when you Consume an Ignited corpse
15% of Damage Taken from Hits is Leeched as Life during Effect
Enemies Ignited by you during Effect take 10% increased Damage
Recover 2% of Energy Shield when you Kill an Enemy during Effect
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.
flavourText: A controlled burn is sometimes necessary for new life.

name: Ashes of the Stars
explicitMods: 12% increased Experience Gain of Gems
+1 to Level of all Skill Gems
+23% to Quality of all Skill Gems
flavourText: A single facet contains the wisdom
of countless disintegrated worlds.

name: Mark of Submission
explicitMods: Curse Enemies with Socketed Hex Curse Gem on Hit
flavourText: So great was the thaumaturgy of a bloodpriest's mark,
that sacrifices soon welcomed their death.

name: Death Rush
explicitMods: Recover 3% of Life on Kill
Gain Adrenaline for 2 seconds on Kill
flavourText: To truly appreciate life you must be there when it ends

name: Atziri's Promise
explicitMods: Gain 8% of Elemental Damage as Extra Chaos Damage during effect
2% of Chaos Damage Leeched as Life during Effect
Gain 7% of Physical Damage as Extra Chaos Damage during effect
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.
flavourText: "Death needs not your understanding. It needs only your loyalty."
- Atziri, Queen of the Vaal

name: Piscator's Vigil
explicitMods: No Physical Damage
18% increased Attack Speed
24% increased Critical Strike Chance
+366 to Accuracy Rating
Attacks with this Weapon have 103% increased Elemental Damage
Damage with Weapons Penetrates 5% Elemental Resistances
flavourText: "Stone still, amidst the reeds,
breath fogging in the iron cold air.
he sits, he waits, he watches.
A piscatorial vigil, sat by the river,
his cathedral, his patience his unanswered prayer."
- Jojoba Mansell, bard, angler, adventurer

name: Soul Ascension
explicitMods: 141% increased Evasion and Energy Shield
+29% to Chaos Resistance
Eat a Soul when you Hit a Rare or Unique Enemy, no more than once every 0.5 seconds
+4 to maximum number of Eaten Souls
flavourText: Fear can be instilled by the smallest entity.

explicitMods: 16% reduced Effect of Marks from Supported Skills
Trigger Supported Skill when you Hit a Rare or Unique Enemy with an Attack
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Curses a single enemy, increasing the damage they take from projectiles, and making projectiles split when hitting them, to hit other targets around them. You can only have one Mark at a time.
explicitMods: Cursed enemies take 34% increased Damage from Projectile Hits
Projectiles which Hit Cursed Enemies Split towards 2 additional targets
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

name: Inpulsa's Broken Heart
explicitMods: +78 to maximum Life
46% increased Damage if you have Shocked an Enemy Recently
24% increased Effect of Shock

Shocked Enemies you Kill Explode, dealing 5% of
their Life as Lightning Damage which cannot Shock
Unaffected by Shock
flavourText: Don't hesitate; bring death to all, conclusively and swiftly,
or they will give you the same treatment.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports skills that hit enemies, causing them to gain bonuses while you have resonance of all three elements, and to grant resonance of elements other than the highest one in a hit. There is a maximum of 50 Resonance for each Element. Cannot support triggered skills, instant skills, orb skills, brands, skills with a reservation, or skills used by totems, traps, or mines. Cannot modify the skills of minions.
explicitMods:
Hits with Supported Skills for which the highest Damage Type is Elemental cause you to gain 25 Resonance of other Elements per second for 2 seconds
Lose 5 Resonance per second of each Element you are not gaining
Supported Skills deal 3% more Elemental Damage per 5 of lowest Resonance
Supported Skills penetrate 16% Elemental Resistances while each Resonance is at least 25
Supported Skills deal 10% increased Elemental Damage

name: The Taming
explicitMods: +22% to all Elemental Resistances

each type of Elemental Ailment on Enemy
flavourText: "Moon after moon did Berek make fools
Of the great and Untamed Three
Until malice for a Brother
Slew the hatred of the Other
And Berek did hunt
Alone and free."
- Berek and the Untamed
